changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Community Notice"

TextENGNew: With the rainy season ending earlier than usual, summer already feels close at hand. I trust this finds everyone in good health and spirits.
The season for this year’s Watanagashi festival is finally upon us.
changeReason: New translation adds 'this year's' and 'festival', specifying the annual recurrence and explicitly naming it a festival, matching the Japanese '今年も' (this year too).

TextENGNew: With the cooperation of the town council, let us make this a wonderful festival for all.
To that end, we kindly ask for everyone’s assistance with the following matters.
(1) Bazaar Donations Wanted!
We are accepting items for the ever-popular Hinamizawa Grand Bazaar.
Leftover summer gifts, outgrown clothing—all contributions are welcome!
changeReason: New translation specifies 'summer gifts' (お中元, mid-year gifts) and 'outgrown clothing' rather than the vaguer 'unconsumed gifts' and 'used clothing', more accurately reflecting the Japanese.

TextENGNew: No perishables, please.
Contact: Makino
(2) Kids’ Festival Taiko Drummers Wanted!
changeReason: New translation changes 'Li'l Festival Drum Dancers' to 'Kids' Festival Taiko Drummers', preserving the Japanese term 'taiko' (太鼓) rather than translating it as generic 'drum dancers'.

TextENGNew: The Kids’ Festival Taiko Circle, renowned for its careful instruction and track record, is accepting last-minute participants.
changeReason: New translation removes the fabricated 'Shoufu Society' name and changes 'choreography' to 'instruction and track record', matching the Japanese 指導と実績 (instruction and track record).

TextENGNew: We’re looking for any attention-loving elementary and middle schoolers!
Contact: Kimiyoshi
(3) Donations Welcome!!
We are accepting monetary donations starting from 1,000 yen.
changeReason: Old translation says 'multiples of 1,000 yen' implying fixed increments; new says 'starting from 1,000 yen' matching the Japanese 一口千円から (from 1,000 yen per unit).

TextENGNew: For every donation, you’ll receive one food stall ticket sheet!
changeReason: Old specifies 'refreshment stand ticket' per '1,000 yen donation'; new says 'food stall ticket sheet' per donation without specifying amount, and adds 'sheet' matching シート in the Japanese.

TextENGNew: Contact: Sonozaki
We are always open to fun ideas for the festival.
If you have any interesting suggestions, please bring them to Village Chief Kimiyoshi’s residence!
changeReason: Old translation calls Kimiyoshi 'mayor'; new correctly uses 'Village Chief', matching the Japanese 村長 (village chief/head).

TextENGNew: (Below the perforated line, a 200-yen food stall ticket is attached.)
